---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<style>
  .reg-hero{background:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);color:#fff;padding:2.5rem 2rem;}
  .reg-hero h1{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:2.2rem;margin:0 0 .4rem;}
  .reg-hero p{opacity:.7;margin:0;font-size:1rem;}
  .reg-wrap{max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.5rem 1.5rem 3rem;}
  .reg-controls{display:flex;gap:.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:end;padding:1.25rem;background:#fff;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);margin-bottom:1rem;}
  .reg-controls .ctrl{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.3rem;}
  .reg-controls label{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--map-text-muted,#64748b);}
  .reg-controls select{padding:.55rem .75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:6px;font-size:.9rem;min-width:160px;background:#fff;}
  .reg-controls select:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(201,162,39,.1);}
  .reg-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;padding:.45rem .85rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
  .reg-pill.active{background:var(--map-red,#c9a227);color:#fff;}
  .reg-pill:not(.active){background:var(--map-bg-section,#f1f5f9);color:var(--map-text-muted,#64748b);}
  .reg-pill:hover:not(.active){background:#e2e8f0;}
  #reg-map{width:100%;height:600px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);z-index:1;}
  .reg-status{padding:.75rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:1rem;background:rgba(201,162,39,.05);border-left:4px solid var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .reg-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:.75rem;margin:1rem 0;}
  .reg-scard{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;padding:1rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);}
  .reg-scard .val{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .reg-scard .lbl{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--map-text-muted,#64748b);margin-top:.2rem;}
  .reg-table-wrap{margin-top:1.5rem;overflow-x:auto;}
  #reg-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:.85rem;}
  #reg-table thead{background:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);color:#fff;position:sticky;top:0;}
  #reg-table th{padding:.65rem .75rem;text-align:left;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;}
  #reg-table th:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
  #reg-table td{padding:.55rem .75rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);}
  #reg-table tbody tr:hover{background:rgba(201,162,39,.03);}
  .reg-table-container{max-height:400px;overflow-y:auto;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;}
  .search-input{padding:.55rem .75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:6px;font-size:.9rem;min-width:220px;}
  .search-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(201,162,39,.1);}
  .dl-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;padding:.5rem 1rem;background:var(--map-red,#c9a227);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:all .15s;}
  .dl-btn:hover{background:#a8871e;transform:translateY(-1px);}
  @media(max-width:768px){
    #reg-map{height:400px;}
    .reg-controls{flex-direction:column;}
    .reg-controls select,.search-input{width:100%;min-width:unset;}
  }
</style>

<section class="reg-hero">
  <div style="max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto;">
    <h1>Facility Registry Explorer</h1>
    <p>Coverage at a glance. The eight countries the HealthScope registry currently reaches, with searchable facility-level detail below.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="reg-wrap">

  <!-- Controls -->
  <div class="reg-controls">
    <div class="ctrl">
      <label>Country</label>
      <select id="f-country">
        <option value="all" selected>All Countries</option>
        <option value="kenya">Kenya (17,353)</option>
        <option value="tanzania">Tanzania (13,075)</option>
        <option value="nigeria">Nigeria (51,023)</option>
        <option value="uganda">Uganda (8,512)</option>
        <option value="zambia">Zambia (3,731)</option>
        <option value="malawi">Malawi (1,929)</option>
        <option value="botswana">Botswana (1,076)</option>
        <option value="ethiopia">Ethiopia (40,035)</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrl">
      <label>Facility Type</label>
      <select id="f-type">
        <option value="all">All Types</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrl">
      <label>Ownership</label>
      <select id="f-ownership">
        <option value="all">All Ownership</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrl">
      <label>Search</label>
      <input type="text" id="f-search" class="search-input" placeholder="Search facility name..."/>
    </div>
    <div class="ctrl" style="margin-left:auto;">
      <label>&nbsp;</label>
      <button class="dl-btn" id="dl-btn" onclick="downloadFiltered()">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
        Download CSV
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status -->
  <div class="reg-status" id="reg-status">Loading facility data from 8 countries...</div>

  <!-- Summary cards -->
  <div class="reg-summary" id="reg-summary"></div>

  <!-- Map -->
  <div id="reg-map"></div>

</div>

<script>
(function(){
  var ETL_BASE = 'etl/data/processed/country_standardized';
  var COUNTRIES = {
    kenya:    {file: ETL_BASE + '/kenya_standardized.csv',    label:'Kenya',    color:'#e05930', bounds:[-4.7, 5.5, 33.9,41.9]},
    tanzania: {file: ETL_BASE + '/tanzania_standardized.csv', label:'Tanzania', color:'#c9a227', bounds:[-11.8,-1.0,29.2,40.6]},
    nigeria:  {file: ETL_BASE + '/nigeria_standardized.csv',  label:'Nigeria',  color:'#2563eb', bounds:[ 4,  14,  2.7,14.7]},
    uganda:   {file: ETL_BASE + '/uganda_standardized.csv',   label:'Uganda',   color:'#059669', bounds:[-1.5, 4.3,29.5,35.1]},
    zambia:   {file: ETL_BASE + '/zambia_standardized.csv',   label:'Zambia',   color:'#f59e0b', bounds:[-18.1,-8.2,21.9,33.7]},
    malawi:   {file: ETL_BASE + '/malawi_standardized.csv',   label:'Malawi',   color:'#8b5cf6', bounds:[-17.2,-9.3,32.6,36.0]},
    botswana: {file: ETL_BASE + '/botswana_standardized.csv', label:'Botswana', color:'#06b6d4', bounds:[-27, -17.7,19.9,29.4]},
    ethiopia: {file: ETL_BASE + '/ethiopia_standardized.csv', label:'Ethiopia', color:'#10b981', bounds:[ 3.0,15.0,33.0,48.0]}
  };

  var allFacilities = [];
  var filtered = [];
  var map, coverageLayer;
  var typesSet = new Set(), ownershipSet = new Set();
  var loadedCount = 0, failedCount = 0, totalCountries = Object.keys(COUNTRIES).length;
  // Country-name strings as they appear in the world GeoJSON
  // (Natural Earth via johan/world.geo.json), keyed to our local key.
  var COUNTRY_NAMES = {
    kenya: 'Kenya', tanzania: 'United Republic of Tanzania', nigeria: 'Nigeria',
    uganda: 'Uganda', zambia: 'Zambia', malawi: 'Malawi', botswana: 'Botswana',
    ethiopia: 'Ethiopia'
  };

  map = L.map('reg-map').setView([4, 25], 3);
  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png',{
    attribution:'&copy; OpenStreetMap &copy; CARTO', maxZoom:8
  }).addTo(map);

  // Load world country boundaries once and overlay only our covered set
  fetch('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johan/world.geo.json/master/countries.geo.json')
    .then(function(r){return r.json();})
    .then(function(geojson){
      // Build reverse map: GeoJSON name -> our country key
      var nameToKey = {};
      Object.keys(COUNTRY_NAMES).forEach(function(k){ nameToKey[COUNTRY_NAMES[k]] = k; });
      coverageLayer = L.geoJSON(geojson, {
        filter: function(feature){ return !!nameToKey[feature.properties.name]; },
        style: function(feature){
          var key = nameToKey[feature.properties.name];
          var col = COUNTRIES[key].color;
          return {color: col, weight: 1.5, opacity: 0.85, fillColor: col, fillOpacity: 0.35};
        },
        onEachFeature: function(feature, layer){
          layer._countryKey = nameToKey[feature.properties.name];
          layer.on('mouseover', function(){ this.setStyle({fillOpacity: 0.6, weight: 2.5}); });
          layer.on('mouseout',  function(){ coverageLayer.resetStyle(this); });
          layer.on('click', function(){
            document.getElementById('f-country').value = this._countryKey;
            applyFilters();
          });
        }
      }).addTo(map);
      refreshCoveragePopups();
      map.fitBounds(coverageLayer.getBounds(), {padding:[20,20]});
    })
    .catch(function(err){ console.error('GeoJSON load failed:', err); });

  function refreshCoveragePopups(){
    if (!coverageLayer) return;
    // Compute current count per country from `filtered` (or `allFacilities` if no filter yet)
    var src = filtered.length > 0 ? filtered : allFacilities;
    var counts = {};
    src.forEach(function(f){ counts[f._country] = (counts[f._country] || 0) + 1; });
    coverageLayer.eachLayer(function(layer){
      var k = layer._countryKey;
      var label = COUNTRIES[k].label;
      var n = counts[k] || 0;
      layer.bindPopup(
        '<div style="min-width:180px;">' +
        '<strong style="font-size:1.05rem;color:'+COUNTRIES[k].color+';">'+label+'</strong><br/>' +
        '<span style="color:#6b6b6b;">Facilities in registry:</span> <strong>'+n.toLocaleString()+'</strong><br/>' +
        '<a href="countries/'+(k.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+k.slice(1))+'.html" style="color:'+COUNTRIES[k].color+';text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">Open country page &rarr;</a>' +
        '</div>'
      );
    });
  }

  function countryDone(key, success){
    if(success) loadedCount++; else failedCount++;
    document.getElementById('reg-status').innerHTML = 'Loaded ' + (loadedCount) + '/' + totalCountries + ' countries...';
    if(loadedCount + failedCount >= totalCountries) onAllLoaded();
  }

  Object.keys(COUNTRIES).forEach(function(key){
    Papa.parse(COUNTRIES[key].file,{
      download:true, header:true, skipEmptyLines:true,
      complete:function(res){
        res.data.forEach(function(r){
          if(!r.facility_name || r.facility_name === 'facility_name') return;
          var lat=parseFloat(r.latitude), lon=parseFloat(r.longitude);
          // Validate coords within country bounding box
          var b = COUNTRIES[key].bounds;
          if(!isNaN(lat) && !isNaN(lon) && (lat < b[0] || lat > b[1] || lon < b[2] || lon > b[3])) { lat=NaN; lon=NaN; }
          r._country = key;
          r._countryLabel = COUNTRIES[key].label;
          r._color = COUNTRIES[key].color;
          r._lat = isNaN(lat)?null:lat;
          r._lon = isNaN(lon)?null:lon;
          r.admin1 = r.admin1 || r.admin2 || '';
          allFacilities.push(r);
          if(r.facility_type && r.facility_type!=='facility_type') typesSet.add(r.facility_type);
          // ETL canonical column is `ownership`; older portal-local CSVs used `facility_ownership`
          var ownVal = r.ownership || r.facility_ownership || '';
          r._ownership = ownVal;
          if(ownVal && ownVal!=='ownership' && ownVal!=='facility_ownership') ownershipSet.add(ownVal);
        });
        countryDone(key, true);
      },
      error:function(){ countryDone(key, false); }
    });
  });

  function onAllLoaded(){
    // Populate filter dropdowns
    var typeSelect = document.getElementById('f-type');
    Array.from(typesSet).sort().forEach(function(t){
      var o=document.createElement('option'); o.value=t; o.textContent=t; typeSelect.appendChild(o);
    });
    var ownSelect = document.getElementById('f-ownership');
    Array.from(ownershipSet).sort().forEach(function(t){
      var o=document.createElement('option'); o.value=t; o.textContent=t; ownSelect.appendChild(o);
    });
    applyFilters();
  }

  function applyFilters(){
    var country = document.getElementById('f-country').value;
    var type = document.getElementById('f-type').value;
    var own = document.getElementById('f-ownership').value;
    var search = document.getElementById('f-search').value.toLowerCase().trim();

    filtered = allFacilities.filter(function(f){
      if(country!=='all' && f._country!==country) return false;
      if(type!=='all' && f.facility_type!==type) return false;
      if(own!=='all' && f._ownership!==own) return false;
      if(search && f.facility_name.toLowerCase().indexOf(search)===-1) return false;
      return true;
    });

    updateStatus();
    updateSummary();
    updateMap();
    zoomToSelection();
  }

  function zoomToSelection(){
    var country = document.getElementById('f-country').value;
    if (!coverageLayer) return;
    if (country === 'all') {
      map.fitBounds(coverageLayer.getBounds(), {padding: [20, 20]});
      return;
    }
    // Zoom to the selected country's polygon
    coverageLayer.eachLayer(function(layer){
      if (layer._countryKey === country) {
        map.fitBounds(layer.getBounds(), {padding: [30, 30]});
      }
    });
  }

  function updateStatus(){
    var countries = new Set();
    filtered.forEach(function(f){ countries.add(f._country); });
    document.getElementById('reg-status').innerHTML =
      '<strong>' + filtered.length.toLocaleString() + '</strong> facilities matched across <strong>' +
      countries.size + '</strong> covered countries. Click a country on the map for details.';
  }

  function updateSummary(){
    var countries={}, types={}, public_count=0, operating=0;
    filtered.forEach(function(f){
      countries[f._countryLabel]=(countries[f._countryLabel]||0)+1;
      types[f.facility_type]=(types[f.facility_type]||0)+1;
      var ow = (f._ownership || '').toLowerCase();
      if(ow && (ow.indexOf('public')>-1 || ow.indexOf('gov')>-1 || ow==='moh')) public_count++;
      if(f.status && (f.status==='Operating'||f.status==='Functional'||f.status==='OPERATIONAL')) operating++;
    });
    var html = '<div class="reg-scard"><div class="val">'+filtered.length.toLocaleString()+'</div><div class="lbl">Total Facilities</div></div>';
    html += '<div class="reg-scard"><div class="val">'+Object.keys(countries).length+'</div><div class="lbl">Countries</div></div>';
    html += '<div class="reg-scard"><div class="val">'+Object.keys(types).length+'</div><div class="lbl">Facility Types</div></div>';
    html += '<div class="reg-scard"><div class="val">'+(filtered.length>0?Math.round(public_count/filtered.length*100):0)+'%</div><div class="lbl">Public Ownership</div></div>';
    html += '<div class="reg-scard"><div class="val">'+(filtered.length>0?Math.round(operating/filtered.length*100):0)+'%</div><div class="lbl">Operational</div></div>';
    document.getElementById('reg-summary').innerHTML = html;
  }

  function updateMap(){
    // Country-coverage view: refresh popup counts to reflect the
    // current filter; the polygons themselves never change.
    refreshCoveragePopups();
  }

  window.downloadFiltered = function(){
    var csv = 'facility_name,facility_code,facility_type,facility_ownership,latitude,longitude,admin1,status,country\n';
    filtered.forEach(function(f){
      csv += '"'+(f.facility_name||'').replace(/"/g,'""')+'",'+
        '"'+(f.facility_code||'')+'",'+
        '"'+(f.facility_type||'')+'",'+
        '"'+(f._ownership||'')+'",'+
        (f.latitude||'')+','+(f.longitude||'')+','+
        '"'+(f.admin1||f.admin2||'')+'",'+
        '"'+(f.status||'')+'",'+
        '"'+f._countryLabel+'"\n';
    });
    var blob = new Blob([csv],{type:'text/csv'});
    var a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = 'healthscope_facilities_export.csv';
    a.click();
  };

  // Wire up filters
  ['f-country','f-type','f-ownership'].forEach(function(id){
    document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
  });
  var searchTimeout;
  document.getElementById('f-search').addEventListener('input',function(){
    clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
    searchTimeout = setTimeout(applyFilters, 300);
  });
})();
</script>
```
